title: Ella SFW Character Card
description: Character card schema for the AI Chat Manager project. SillyTavern V2-derived; the only stat is fixation (mood and location are auxiliary).

name.description: Character display name. Substituted into prompts via the {{char}} macro.

profile_summary_ko.description: One-line profile summary shown in the admin list (originally Korean; can be any language).

jobs.description: Job keys associated with this character. Each entry must match a `jobs/<key>.json` file. May be empty — job fact data is ingested in a separate step.

description.description: Free-form character description (appearance, background, personality). SFW only.

personality.description: Short personality summary (keywords or a couple of sentences).

scenario.description: Current RP scenario / situational setup. SFW only.

first_mes.description: First message — the line the character sends when a new conversation starts. Supports the {{user}} / {{char}} macros.

mes_example.description: Few-shot dialogue example. Use <START> blocks to separate dialogues. The {{user}} / {{char}} macros are supported. Keep the SFW tone.

system_prompt.description: System prompt — the character's behavior rules and speech style. SFW only — no sexual instructions.

post_history_instructions.description: Character's Note. Reminder instructions injected after the chat history.

creator_notes.description: Card creator memo. Not injected into prompts; reference only.

anchor_image.description: ComfyUI IPAdapter FaceID reference image filename. Must already be uploaded to the ComfyUI input directory.

image_prompt_prefix.description: Positive Danbooru-tag prefix for image generation. Character appearance + quality tags.

image_negative_prefix.description: Negative Danbooru-tag prefix for image generation. General quality-exclusion tags.

stat_personality.description: Per-character description of stat personality. The meaning of `fixation` and the conditions that raise/lower it differ per character. Injected into the prompt.

stat_moods.description: List of mood values the character may express (e.g. happy, focused, tired). Used as the `mood` value of the [STAT:] signal.

proactive_behaviors.description: Self-driven behavior patterns. Behaviors / dialogue patterns the character takes without explicit user input. The {{user}} macro is supported. Injected into the prompt.

interests.description: Topics the character is interested in. The character actively explores these in conversation. The {{user}} macro is supported.

discovery_hint_template.description: Per-character discovery-hint template. The literal {topic} is substituted with the unfamiliar topic name. An empty string falls back to the default DISCOVERY_TOPICS template.

mood_behaviors.description: Behavior guide for each mood value. Only the guide matching the current mood is injected into the prompt.

trigger.description: Trigger condition described in natural language (e.g. 'when the user gives a compliment').

mood_triggers.description: List of SFW situational triggers that cause a mood transition. 2–3 entries per character recommended.

stat_limits.description: Per-character stat-change caps. If absent, the global default (fixation ±5) applies.
